name: MongoDB, Inc.
summary: MongoDB, Inc. (ticker: MDB) is a technology company that operates under a 2016 Equity Incentive Plan providing performance-based restricted stock unit awards to participants. The provided filing excerpt is an equity compensation agreement (Exhibit 10.15) and does not contain a business description of MongoDB's products or services.
